results.title: Legislation funds long-sought Glacial Lakes State Trail extension
results.description: The appropriation will make it possible to develop a four-mile trail linking the Glacial Lakes State Trail in New London to Sibley State Park. Three trail projects are sharing about $5 million.

results.title: World Cup Phishing Campaign Nearly Triples With 203 Unique IP Addresses
results.description: A large-scale phishing campaign targeting the 2026 FIFA World Cup has grown far beyond what security researchers originally thought. What began as a documented set of 79 fraudulent domains has ballooned into a network of at least 222 domains spread across 203 unique IP addresses, making it nearly three times larger than first reported. The [...] The post World Cup Phishing Campaign Nearly Triples With 203 Unique IP Addresses appeared first on Cyber Security News .
